summary: Verified all 5 UI/UX tweaks for Bathroom Landing Page at /shop/bathroom. All features working correctly: (1) Video autoplay code implemented with autoPlay muted loop playsInline attributes - currently shows placeholder since video_url is empty in DB, (2) Large Public/Trade discount cards (35%/50%) visible, (3) Sign-in modal has Sign In, Create Free Account buttons and Apply for Trade link with correct navigation, (4) No 'Watch Video' button present, (5) 'Exclusive' badge visible instead of 'Special Offer'. Fixed Apply for Trade link navigation from /shop/trade-register to /shop/trade/register.
